article_title: Bylaw 14743 — Housing Agreement (3460 Kalyk Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Housing Agreement Locks Non-Market Senior Rental Units at 3460 Kalyk Avenue
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council adopted Bylaw 14743 on May 13, 2025, authorising a housing agreement with Jubilee Multi Generational Housing Society to secure non-market rental and inclusionary units for income-qualified senior households at a new six-storey development.
briefs.action_required: If you own or manage rental property near this site, review inclusionary unit obligations and tenant eligibility rules under the new housing agreement.
briefs.article_title: Bylaw 14743 — Housing Agreement (3460 Kalyk Avenue) Bylaw 2025
